args.name: concept:http-request
args.wp_rule: Performs the HTTP request and returns concept:http-response. May raise an http error or refuse along any documented loss dimension. Library callsites like libcurl perform, Java HttpClient send, Python urllib.request.urlopen, JS fetch, Python requests.get, and Rust reqwest::get all bind to this operation and produce response data. Loss dimensions (catalog metadata): body-encoding, cancellation, cookie-jar, redirect-policy, retries, streaming-body, sync-vs-async, timeout, tls-pinning. Per-realization values for these dimensions live on the LossyMorphismMemento / RealizationDesugaringMemento for each (concept, language, library) cell, not on this shape.
